allow: PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; where.exe gh 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output $p } }; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet" -Recurse -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:Path;C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; gh repo list --limit 100 --json name,visibility,isFork,isArchived,primaryLanguage,stargazerCount,updatedAt,pushedAt,description | ConvertFrom-Json | Sort-Object pushedAt -Descending | ForEach-Object { $lang = if \($_.primaryLanguage\) { $_.primaryLanguage.name } else { "-" }; $desc = if \($_.description\) { $_.description } else { "" }; "{0,-40} {1,-8} {2,-12} stars={3,3}  fork={4,-5} arch={5,-5} pushed={6}  {7}" -f $_.name, $_.visibility, $lang, $_.stargazerCount, $_.isFork, $_.isArchived, $_.pushedAt.Substring\(0,10\), $desc })
